title: US military blockade on Iranian ports takes effect
snippet: US military blockade on Iranian ports started at 10 AM ET Monday April 13. CENTCOM: blockade targets all maritime traffic entering/exiting Iranian ports. Non-Iran traffic exempted. 15 warships deployed. One sanctioned tanker Elpis passed through; Botswana-registered Ostria turned back within 41 minutes.
source_name: CNN, also covered by CBS News, NBC News, CNBC, Bloomberg
tag_reason: Previous day reported blockade declaration only. Today: actual implementation begins with specific timing (10 AM ET), vessel count (15 warships), and first vessel movements (Elpis/Ostria).
